content.en:
World of Relics.

It's ruined, but it's not completely depleted, and there's still a lot of resources.

So, Ye Tian began to collect resources here.

I have to say that although there are very few resources here, the quality is very high, and in a short time, Ye Tian has collected enough resources to condense the replica body many times.

So, he immediately condensed the other two replica bodies.

As for the copy body, there is still a copy body left in the outside world to hide, lest he can't get out, and the copy body will be trapped here, after all, the copy body in the outside world doesn't have any resources, and there is no way to condense other copy bodies.

this day.

Ye Tian found a corpse, and it was also the corpse of an Eternal Realm powerhouse.

This is a female corpse, wearing a battle armor, but the battle armor is extremely broken, and the place where it is directly turned into nothingness, which has not been repaired yet, and there is a three-inch-long sword on her body, which pierces her body.

This is only a superficial wound.

Ye Tian's divine sense probed the past and saw that every particle in the opponent's body had lost its will power, and any particle had a residual sword path breath, obviously by a strong "Seven Three Zero" sword path eternal realm that had used the sword path eternal technique to erase the will power and also erase the life.

"Huh!"

Ye Tian screamed in surprise.

He found that this corpse was a little special, although the other party had fallen, but from the corpse, he could still see some traces of the other party's cultivation.

Maybe the other Eternal Realms couldn't see the condition of this corpse, but he could see it.

This corpse had necessarily fused the innate eternal rules with the will, and he had fused it so that he could sense it.

Judging from the aura emanating from the corpse, this is just the corpse of an Immortal Realm Lord, but it has achieved the fusion of will and innate eternal rules, and it is obvious that the system she cultivates is not the system of the Source Sea and the Space-Time Territory, but the cultivation system behind the ruins of the True Legend Tower.

Perhaps in that system, the half-step Eternal Realm can try to fuse the will and the innate eternal rules, and many Eternal Realms will have the Will Eternal Technique.

"This corpse is of great value to me, it can be studied carefully, and it will be of great help to my will to merge with the innate eternal rules!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he took the body away.

It's a pity that she doesn't have any treasure resources on her, and obviously after being killed, the resources on her body were taken away.

In the following days, Ye Tian found a lot of corpses in this ruin world, all of them were corpses of the Eternal Realm, and there were traces of the fusion of will and innate eternal rules on their bodies.

Therefore, Ye Tian took away all these corpses.

Ye Tian has been looking for this relic world for a long time, but he has not seen a living eternal realm, and even there are very few living beings, only some half-step eternal realm life, but unfortunately he is trapped in this ruin world and has no way forward, so he has not been able to break through to become an eternal realm.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian came to the center of the ruins world and saw a ruin here.

The original battle here must have been extremely tragic, and Ye Tian even felt a lot of aura that made his heart palpitate, and he didn't even dare to approach.

Moreover, there are many corpse fragments of the Eternal Realm here, such as a finger and an arm, which have lost the support of their strength over the long years of evolution, and are not complete corpses, so they have turned into treasures.

One of the mountains, for example, was made of a bone.

I have to say that because there are too many eternal realms that have fallen here, the resources that are born are very rich.

So, Ye Tian began to collect the resources here

After a long time.

All the resources that Ye can collect here have been collected, and it can be regarded as a bumper harvest.

Subsequently.

He began to venture deep into the ruins of this battlefield, and what he wanted to collect most was inheritance, even the most rubbish inheritance, at least to give him a little guidance, at least to save countless years of research.

However, there were too many traces of terror here, some of which had existed for countless eternal years, and they could kill Ye Tian in an instant.

According to Ye Tian's guess, the existence that left such a terrifying trace must have surpassed the Legendary Lord level, and if he slowly comprehended and cultivated here, he could obtain huge benefits.

Of course, Ye Tian didn't have the heart to slowly comprehend here now.

He let a replica body go deep into the depths of the shattered void, into the depths of the battlefield, and saw countless void fragments and temple fragments, and his heart was full of emotion.

Suddenly.

Ye Tian triggered a force, and saw a thin silk thread floating in the void, directly crossing Ye Tian's body.

The next moment.

Ye Tian's copy body directly disintegrated, and it disintegrated without a trace of resistance.

Outside the ruins of the battlefield.

Ye Tian sensed that his duplicate body had fallen, and immediately condensed another copy body and let it enter the ruins of the battlefield again.

In this way, Ye Tian tried again and again, even if he fell many times, he still went deep into the ruins of the battlefield.

-

Somewhere in the ruins of the battlefield.

A phalanx floats there, and on the phalanx is a ring inlaid with a void orb.

However, the Void Ball was also badly damaged.

"There's still a Void Ball left!"

Ye Tian was excited.

No matter how broken such a Void Ball is, maybe there is still a small piece of Void Heaven and Earth preserved, which means that there is something good.

So, he took the phalanx and returned the same way, lest an accident cause the phalanx and the Void Ball to be lost.

Soon.

The copy body returned, and Ye Tian began to stabilize the void, and only then did he slowly open the void ball.

Rumble!!!

A small piece of broken void appeared in Ye Tian's perception, but this broken void seemed to be shattered at any time.

Ye Tian took out all the treasures in this broken void as quickly as possible, and the void ball was completely shattered by the influence of Ye Tian's power.

"There are still a lot of treasures!"

Ye Tian said happily.

Obviously, these things belong to the rudimentary, that is, the winner of the Great War left out this Void Ball, otherwise it would not be his turn.

This should be an Immortal Realm Lord's treasure, and it is only a small part, so for Ye Tian, these resources are not too much, but they are not too little, enough to make his net worth increase a lot.....

But what really made Ye Tian care was that there were still a lot of inheritances and classics here, and these things were more precious to him.

Ye Tian accepted these inheritances little by little, browsed some classics, and gradually gained a lot of things.

"Silence!"

From the inheritance and data classics, it can be understood that this Immortal Realm Lord came from a place called Silent Void, and it is very likely that it is this ruin world.

Other than that.

Ye Tian also learned about the other party's cultivation system, which was indeed a little different from Yuanhai.

For example, if the other party has cultivated to the half-step Eternal Realm, he can try to fuse his will with the Eternal Rules or the Innate Eternal Rules, and if he fuses to a certain extent, he can break through to the Eternal Realm.

And they divided the eternal realm into the realm of will, the realm of immortality, the realm of immortality, the realm of legends, and the realm of legends.

If they want to cultivate to the Legendary Realm, they must regularize all the particles in their bodies, and each body particle contains the power of the will rules after the will is fused with the innate eternal rules.

On the side, on the side, the will and body are 100% fused before they can impact the Legendary Lord realm.

However, in the Eternal Realm on the Silent Void side, if you want to attack the Legendary Realm Lord, you must completely fuse the power of the will rules with the body, and this step is extremely difficult.

"I didn't expect that in the end, their cultivation system would still follow our path here, and after our path here reached the Legendary Lord, we had to follow their path. In this way, everyone is the same when they reach the legendary realm. The only difference is that they have a way to fuse the will with the body, but we don't have the way to fuse the will with the innate eternal rules!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And he has also obtained a secret art inheritance, which can try to fuse the will with the innate eternal rules, this secret art is called the Chen Void Technique!

However, after Ye Tian's copied body cultivated on the 2.6 side of the space-time territory, he found that this secret technique was useless.

Suddenly, Ye Tian understood something.

"Heaven and Earth !! Different"

Ye Tian thought.

On the Yuanhai side, if you want to take the path of merging the will with the innate eternal rules, it is far beyond the heaven and earth where the Jingxu is located, and if you want to take the path of the fusion of the will and the body, it is extremely difficult.

This is the result of heaven and earth.

"It seems that I must use the path of fusion of will and body to become the eternal realm, and then completely merge the power of will with the innate eternal rules to reach the legendary realm. Ye Tian thought.

Although we didn't achieve much this time, we did make the path clear.

In the years to come, Ye Tian continued to search for treasures in the ruins of this Silent Void Battlefield, and at the same time, he also copied his body to continue to practice here.

Gradually, Ye Tian obtained more and more good things, and some of them even fused with the will to ascend and the innate eternal rules.

In the blink of an eye, a thousand eternal years have passed.

this day.

The Stargazing Sword Ancestor came to inform Ye Tian that he was ready to attack the Eternal Realm and let Ye Tian come to observe. _
